textByHash.7f5572e0073c1967d42e2a30e4b7232e98e26bd0: Hello there. Looking to buy some of my wares? I also have a special item in stock that I reckon you'll love!
textByHash.6fa322390e3cbe279e3e478d12ab1fcac773de4e: Oh... I seem to have misplaced it. Sorry about that. If you come back later, I might have found it.
textByHash.29f188b1e8f2bdfb843c39584952adbcc4ce4fc5: Oh it's fantastic! However, before we go into the details, you should make some room to carry it.
textByHash.a1c1924c2749151c64543219cdc132fc61ecba21: I just know that once you see it, you'll want it!
textByHash.7ba8ebf90c6f1ab75a36ac69ada3a9dae60ad777: Oh it's fantastic! It's an exclusive item just for you! Consider it a thank you for all you've done for our city.
textByHash.c69bb3efa7ee9c8c55ea4ee5179abab2671c8bdd: Isn't it wonderful! Here, try it on!
textByHash.3217b7fd8cd1b3673748b3449030d5289974cb5a: Ah, it seems the ring is too small. Never mind.
textByHash.58212e59dff66f38800befb20de4a1957c20461a: Well, time for me to get on with my work. Come back soon.
textByHash.5d3df806085145bb6522dc8828c61617b31bc42c: Oh, I see. Well come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.d29b385e9def3bb65d814de225b9b40a5d1f4cfb: Hello there. Looking to buy some of my wares?
textByHash.34186cfc0c7f21a4ee8e4dd0c6b1daa0004fd1d1: Oh I think you're going to love it!
textByHash.8fd10a0d968333938181b567a67151472ae894e0: Yes, I'm sorry the ring didn't fit. Still, nothing lost and nothing gained, right?
textByHash.83ac1d3ed7482894cbc571d415d53bb29c8719e0: Well, I suppose you can. But first, you should make some room to carry it.
textByHash.78ee6f7e86c84997375a35c9dbab7e4b354d8edd: Still too small I'm afraid. Now, it's time for me to get on with my work. Come back soon.
textByHash.9655794d3c562d3cb03710189c2cad161355fd56: Sorry, but I have a lot to do. Come back soon.
textByHash.ad498773762f5c87025573f775247a9cf308b59e: Slow at the moment. Maybe time will make things better. Perhaps you'd like to help by buying something yourself?
